name: rabbit-feature
summary: Owns the rabbit-feature-touch orchestration skill plus the rabbit-feature-scope skill (with resolve-scope.py and format-feature-context.py scripts), the rabbit-feature-spec skill for spec authoring, the rabbit-feature-new scaffolding skill (BACKLOG-2), and the rabbit-feature-audit conformance skill (BACKLOG-3). Dispatcher-side surface; executor-side (dispatch-tdd-subagent.py and tdd-step.py) lives in tdd-subagent and tdd-state-machine respectively.
deprecation_criterion: When feature-touch orchestration is natively handled by the rabbit CLI or by Claude Code's native workflow mechanism.
spec_no_change_reason: spec relocation already committed at HEAD~1 by dispatcher; test-red transition has no pending diff to point at
